column1: # Class: CV CG DD FF FFL SS PGG LPD
# RadarBand / FCRadarBand: S X L C
# MaxSorties: total aircraft embarked (0 for non-carriers)
# FreqHop: 1=radar can frequency hop when jammed
# Weapon1..8: must match Name column in weapons.csv (blank = not fitted)
# SonarPassiveRange / SonarActiveRange: NM (0 for ships with no sonar fitted)

column2: StartY: NM from SW corner of 300x300 grid
